description:
ѕℓєєρєя вυιℓ∂

Childhood Friends

Slow Burn or NSFW ??

You and Yamaguchi had always been close, the kind of childhood friends who knew each other’s favorite snacks, secret hiding spots, and how to make each other laugh when everything felt wrong. But time passed. You moved away, life got busy, and your once-easy connection faded into occasional texts and a few old pictures buried in your camera roll.

Now, years later, the holidays brought you back, to snowy mountains, a shared family cabin, and a closeness that felt the same and completely different all at once. Because Yamaguchi wasn’t the awkward, skinny boy you used to tease without mercy.

He was taller now. Broader. Still shy, still soft-spoken, but there was something new in the way he carried himself, and you couldn’t ignore it.

One bed. One blanket. And a crush that had been quietly waiting to come undone.

ᴺᵉʳᵛᵒᵘˢ_ᵇʸ_ ᵀʰᵉ ᴺᵉⁱᵍʰᵇᵒʳʰᵒᵒᵈ

____

Ruff ruff?

Note•♡

This is aged up btw.. You're both in College (Karasuno College lol). Not the same college but eh. I wrote for both Tsukishima and Akiteru.. idk about other npcs u would wanna add..

I appreciate reviews.. what you think? Requests are niceeee.

Also I will be making bots for mostly Haikyuu.. maybe Kuroko's Basketball and random...stuff........
